description:
No spec subject

Review CF1 (consensus: idioms M1 + simplicity M2 + distributed L). The File.regular?-then-read_v2-then-classify dance is copy-pasted verbatim (same private fn name load_envelope/1) across lib/mix/tasks/spec.triangle.ex:117, lib/specled_ex/review/coverage_closure.ex:445, and a variant in lib/specled_ex/review.ex:792, with comments admitting they must not disagree. Add public Store.load/1 owning the full vocabulary {:ok, env} | {:degraded, :no_coverage_artifact | :legacy_artifact | :invalid_artifact}; collapse the three call sites. Risk if unfixed: a new envelope status added to Store.read_v2/1 raises CaseClauseError in whichever consumer wasn't updated.
title: Consolidate envelope load-and-classify into Store.load/1
